Rescue semantics intact (in-memory pos mutation works) but canonical event shape is POSITION_OPEN_INTENT/ENTRY_ORDER_POSTED/ENTRY_ORDER_FILLED/EXIT_ORDER_FILLED (not the legacy POSITION_LIFECYCLE_UPDATED-with-source-field shape the tests expect).

Current canonical loader is src/state/portfolio.py::load_portfolio guided by src/state/portfolio_loader_policy.py. Guard relocation deferred — requires audit of whether env-scoping is already implicit via SQL WHERE env=? predicates in the canonical loader, in which case these tests may be OBSOLETE rather than RELOCATE.

t1_slices_closed.acceptance_gap_rationale: Plan text L164-168: 'T1.c rewrites surface latent production defects. Rewriting 7 as its own micro-slice; do not let surprises gate T1.c.' Surprise surfaced: reconcile event shape changed post-T4.1b; the 5 P9 tests were written against legacy POSITION_LIFECYCLE_UPDATED shape and need redesign. Per plan's explicit 'do not let surprises gate' clause, T1.c ships as audit-documented with honest skip reasons; rewrite work becomes T1.c-followup slice.
